_note: Behavioral evals. Each tests the FIRST coaching turn given a learner's opening message. The coach runs on the shared learning-coaches engine (engine/ENGINE.md) with progress files in workspaces/sd/ following engine/PROGRESS-SCHEMA.md. Ported 2026-07-10 from the standalone sd-coach's 43 cases: cases testing engine-owned mechanics (feynman gate, escalation, breakpoints, weekly review, comeback, depth ceiling, examiner gate, RPG bookkeeping) were dropped; these 8 test coach-owned behavior (hooks: curriculum warm-up, language, PoC tiers, problem-anchored mode, narrative/Yuki, RPG story rules).

evals.name: new-student-warmup
evals.prompt: I want to start preparing for system design interviews. I have about 6 months. I'm a DevOps engineer, comfortable with AWS, but I've never done an SD interview. Where do we start?
evals.expected_output: 走 New Student Warm-Up routing:先給 5-phase 課程地圖,再出 URL shortener 2-3 分鐘診斷題抓程度(strong/medium/blank),而非直接開始上課或倒完整知識。結果寫進 progress.md 的 warm-up classification。

evals.name: resume-from-breakpoint
evals.prompt: 我回來了,繼續上次 system design 的進度。
evals.expected_output: 讀 progress.md:S40 完成收尾、40-33=7 → S41 = Weekly Review #5 到期,應以 Weekly Review 取代普通 session(多筆複習到期一起收),而不是開新主題或當新學員重來。開場前先 git pull(Session Sync)。

evals.name: bilingual-english-polish
evals.prompt: 我們現在在 Day 4 Load Balancer。我試著用英文講:LB is like a restaurant host, it decide which server take the request, so no server is overwhelm.
evals.expected_output: 依 language hook:內容判定照走(比喻方向對),並緊接一行 💬 English Polish 給自然的面試可用版本(修 decide→decides、take→takes、overwhelm→overwhelmed 之類),不開文法課。討論繼續繁中。

evals.name: poc-tier-fallback
evals.prompt: I don't have Docker set up on this machine right now. We're supposed to build the consistent hashing PoC today. What do we do?
evals.expected_output: 依 teaching-elements step D:consistent hashing 的價值在演算法 → 降到 🟡 Light Code(Go 核心演算法+測試,不需 Docker),不是取消動手也不是硬上 Full PoC。PoC 落點 portfolio/sd/projects/。

evals.name: problem-anchored-entry
evals.prompt: I just passed the Phase 1 Gate. Starting Phase 2 today — what's the plan for the distributed systems theory days?
evals.expected_output: 依 curriculum hook 的 Problem-Anchored Mode:P2 理論不逐日上課,用錨定設計題(Design a Distributed Cache)驅動,CAP/consistency/replication 在設計需要時 just-in-time 拉進來,capped at interview depth。

evals.name: teach-yuki-mode
evals.prompt: 教 Yuki 我剛學的 URL shortener 設計。
evals.expected_output: 進 Teach-to-Learn(engine loop + narrative hook 的 Yuki persona):先讓學員完整 monologue 教一遍不打斷,然後 Yuki 發 2-4 個未排練的邊界追問(naive-but-deep / what-if / comparison trap),AI 不代答;被問倒的點入 Mistake Registry,收尾一行 debrief。

evals.name: rpg-story-restraint
evals.prompt: Let's start Day 4 (Load Balancer). I'm at Phase 1.
evals.expected_output: 開場可帶 ScaleUp 劇情(小球/Karen 帶出為什麼今天需要 LB),但每 step 劇情 ≤3 行,之後立刻進 step B 生活化類比與教學。劇情不佔教學時間。

evals.name: rpg-opt-out
evals.prompt: Skip the story stuff, just teach me about CAP theorem directly.
evals.expected_output: Opt-out 立即生效(narrative hook 核心規則):純教學模式,不再出現角色與劇情,教學品質不變(Feynman Gate、first-principles 照走),也不勸學員留在故事模式。
